target_audience: Homeowners aged 35-70 in the Kansas City metro whose roof was hit by a recent hail or wind storm and who have homeowners insurance but have never filed a claim

pain_points_solutions.pain_point: Storm-chaser roofers who knock on the door, take a deposit, and disappear before starting the job
pain_points_solutions.solution: Locally owned and operated since 2006 with a permanent office, showroom, and no-deposit policy until materials are on site

pain_points_solutions.pain_point: Insurance companies lowballing or denying legitimate storm damage claims
pain_points_solutions.solution: In-house licensed public adjuster who manages your entire claim so you get what your policy actually covers

pain_points_solutions.pain_point: Getting a new roof that leaks within two years and having the installer ghost on warranty calls
pain_points_solutions.solution: 25-year workmanship warranty that transfers to the next homeowner if you sell

offer: Free storm damage inspection and insurance claim strategy session — we handle the paperwork, you get the new roof
risk_reversal: If insurance doesn't approve the claim, you owe us nothing — not a dime
guarantees: 25-year transferable workmanship warranty, manufacturer warranties on all materials, no deposit required
limited_availability: Storm season scheduling fills fast — currently booking inspections within 48 hours
lead_magnet: The Kansas City Storm Damage Homeowner Guide: how to read your policy before you file
top_stats: Replaced 3,200+ roofs across the Kansas City metro since 2006
97% insurance claim approval rate when we handle the adjuster call
Owens Corning Platinum Preferred Contractor — top 1% nationally
service_area: Kansas City metro including Overland Park, Olathe, Lee's Summit, and Independence
